links.source_location: Both document project architecture — CLAUDE.md targets AI agent, README.md targets human developer
OG meta + Twitter card + Schema.org JSON-LD blocks
Both serve the same GEO/AI discoverability goal — llms.txt provides content, robots.txt grants access
GPTBot, OAI-SearchBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot explicit Allow
Both depict same chess knight motif — brand identity shared between favicon and social preview
Person portrait in portfolio folder suggests consultant/team representation
Person portrait in portfolio folder suggests team/client representation
Both are Google Sheets logo variants at different eras
Both are HubSpot brand assets — full logo vs icon variant
Both are LinkedIn brand assets — full wordmark vs square icon
Both are sales/data tools showcased in portfolio as BNK Conseil service delivery tools
Both are AI assistant platforms used in portfolio skill demonstrations
